steps.title: Set up the system of equations from both stores
steps.content:
Let $r$ = pints of raspberries and $b$ = pints of blackberries.

Store A: $$5.50r + 3.00b = 37.00$$
Store B: $$6.50r + 8.00b = 66.00$$

steps.title: Multiply both equations by 2 to clear decimals
Eliminate r using multiplication and subtraction to solve for b
steps.content:
Multiply the first equation by 13 and the second by 11 to align the $r$ coefficients:
$$143r + 78b = 962$$
$$143r + 176b = 1452$$
Subtract the first from the second:
$$98b = 490$$
$$b=5$$
That matches Choice B — $5$.
